Hardware Component File

ECU HITACHI X91 6x40

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference HTC-X91-6x40.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 7E0
Receive ID 7E8
Functional Addr 7A
Functional Name Injection

Stored in E2PROMDetect the speed limiter switch connection. Stored in E2PROMDetect cruise control option with security on configuration detection. ECUDocs

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.

HQ

London, United Kingdom

  • Manufacturers
  • ECU Database
  • Marketplace

Laravel Company

Expert Laravel development and systems architecture across Europe.
